name: Stalwart's Banner (Major)
description:
This magical banner mimics the rich green of summer grass. While holding a stalwart's banner, you can use the following ability.

Activate—Stand Firm (1 Action) (concentrate)

Frequency once per minute

Effect You and allies within your banner's aura gain 15 temporary Hit Points and a +3 status bonus to your Fortitude DC and Reflex DC against any effect that would move you or knock you Prone. These effects last for 1 round.

Effect: Stalwart's Banner
